Video.summary: The North Atlantic Ocean is generous with her bounty, until she takes a life in return. Mark braves the deep seas on the most dangerous day of the lobster fishing season.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Dangerous Waters

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Dangerous Waters
Storm Hunters | Dangerous Waters
Storm Hunters | Dangerous Waters

Video.summary: Storm Chaser Jaclyn Whittal anxiously experiences her first Category 4 Tropical Storm.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Landfall!

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Landfall!
Storm Hunters | Landfall!
Storm Hunters | Landfall!

Video.summary: Mark joins George and a team of scientists in exploring the world’s largest lava lake - Mount Nyiragongo.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Ultimate Risk

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Ultimate Risk
Storm Hunters | Ultimate Risk
Storm Hunters | Ultimate Risk

Video.summary: Destructive tornadoes and ferocious winds are only two elements Mark and Jaclyn encounter when storm hunting.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Perilous Pursuit

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Perilous Pursuit
Storm Hunters | Perilous Pursuit
Storm Hunters | Perilous Pursuit

Video.summary: Record setting snowfall, tidal waves, rainfall, and flooding all make history in this noteworthy countdown.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Storms for the Record Books

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Storms for the Record Books
Extreme Weather Countdown | Storms for the Record Books
Extreme Weather Countdown | Storms for the Record Books

Video.summary: Mother Nature is back and ready to blow you away, with some of the fiercest, most electrifying, and most extreme weather we have ever seen! So buckle in and let’s get ready to ride!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats
Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats
Extreme Weather Countdown | It's Raining Cats & Dogs & Boats

Video.summary: It doesn't matter that there are over a 1000 tornados or millions of thunderstorms take place all over the world every year; someone is always going to be there to capture it and when they do, you know that we are going to show it to you!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | 1000 Lawn Chairs in the Wind

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | 1000 Lawn Chairs in the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | 1000 Lawn Chairs in the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | 1000 Lawn Chairs in the Wind

Video.summary: Mother Nature is back and ready to show you just how powerful she can be!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Darkest Before the Storm

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Darkest Before the Storm
Extreme Weather Countdown | Darkest Before the Storm
Extreme Weather Countdown | Darkest Before the Storm

Video.summary: Just when you thought it was safe to go back outside, we've go a brand new episode to change your mind! Brace yourselves, because we're about to head into frenzy once again! From twisty tornados to scary storms, we've got them all.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Rain or High Water

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Rain or High Water
Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Rain or High Water
Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Rain or High Water

Video.summary: Mother Nature isn't messing around and she's back with even more of the craziest weather clips assembled.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Steal My Thunder

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Steal My Thunder
Extreme Weather Countdown | Steal My Thunder
Extreme Weather Countdown | Steal My Thunder

Video.summary: The forecast says you're in for a blustery day, followed by some heavy rain, and a slight chance of a tornado.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Water Under the Bridge

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Water Under the Bridge
Extreme Weather Countdown | Water Under the Bridge
Extreme Weather Countdown | Water Under the Bridge

Video.summary: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide
Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide
Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide

Video.summary: Island Air drops off a group of desperate hunters in the heart of the bush as a deep freeze hits Kodiak.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Desperate Times

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Desperate Times
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Desperate Times
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Desperate Times

Video.summary: An unexpected storm leaves Island Air struggling to pull their planes for mandatory maintenance.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Closing Time

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Closing Time
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Closing Time
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Closing Time

Video.summary: Tanalian Aviation pilots assist with a search and rescue for an experienced hiker in the winter wilderness.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Without a Trace

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Without a Trace
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Without a Trace
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Without a Trace

Video.summary: Island Air battles time and the elements, to rescue a group trapped in Deadman's Bay.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Deadman's Survival

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Deadman's Survival
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Deadman's Survival
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Deadman's Survival

Video.summary: Pilot Josiah Freeman takes a professional snowboarder Mark Barajas to the top of the Chugach Mountains for some hellacious heli-skiing.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Heaven at 5,000 Feet

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Heaven at 5,000 Feet
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Heaven at 5,000 Feet
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Heaven at 5,000 Feet

Video.summary: The bush pilots have to use all their skills - scuba diving, underwater rigging and expert flying - to try and salvage a de Havilland Beaver wing at the bottom of the 6 Mile Lake.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Into The Deep

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Into The Deep
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Into The Deep
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Into The Deep

Video.summary: Pilot Peter Rosendahl combats gail force wind while taxiing a group of hunters to a floating lodge.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Risky Business

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Risky Business
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Risky Business
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Risky Business

Video.summary: Alaskan bush pilots risk everything to save hunters struggling to stay alive in a remote area of Kodiak.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Meet Island Air

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Meet Island Air
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Meet Island Air
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Meet Island Air

Video.summary: Rough seas have a couple of surfers turning to Island Air for an adventure of a life time.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up

Video.summary: Joel and Mark Barker tempt fate and fly into no man's land to find and salvage a white airplane in a snowy forest, and fight hypothermia along the way.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Salvage Gone Awry

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Salvage Gone Awry
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Salvage Gone Awry
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Salvage Gone Awry

Video.summary: New pilots are put to the test to see if they have what it takes to fly for Island Air.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Training Day

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Training Day
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Training Day
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Training Day

Video.summary: Tanalian Aviation battles winter weather to ferry ice climbers onto the Knik Glacier.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Ice Climbers

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Ice Climbers
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Ice Climbers
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Ice Climbers

Video.summary: The Tanalian bush pilots transport extreme paragliders to Moose Creek, in the Talkeetna Range, for a once-in-a-lifetime airborne experience.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Flying High

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Flying High
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Flying High
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Flying High

Video.summary: While on a routine sightseeing flight, a massive storm has the pilots fighting to keep their passengers safe.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight

Video.summary: Tanalian Aviation bush pilots Joel and Josiah earn their keep slinging a stranded snow machine.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Hanging by a Thread

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Hanging by a Thread
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Hanging by a Thread
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Hanging by a Thread

Video.summary: On a rare day off, Josiah and his friends white water raft where few have gone before - on top of the massive Knik Glacier.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | On Thin Ice

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | On Thin Ice
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | On Thin Ice
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | On Thin Ice
